title: Converting SQL Server types and rules to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to guide developers in converting SQL Server database schemas and code to PostgreSQL equivalents. The tutorial covers schema conversion tasks like translating user-defined types to PostgreSQL DOMAINs while explaining the underlying concepts.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to convert SQL Server types and rules to PostgreSQL during database migration. It covers how the tool assists developers in migrating database schemas, including converting user-defined types into PostgreSQL DOMAINs. The takeaway is that an LLM can generate the converted code and explain the conversion process, making schema migration between the two database systems more approachable.
